content.en:
"It's safe!"

Ye Tian finally breathed a sigh of relief when he saw that he had entered the foreign world.

Although the Abyss Tribulation Beast can also enter the foreign world, it definitely does not dare to enter easily, otherwise it will definitely die.

In the Abyssal Tribulation Beasts, the Supreme cannot enter, so some Abyss Tribulation Beasts are almost invincible, but if they are in the outside world, the Abyss Tribulation Beasts will be hunted by the Supreme One.

An Abyssal Tribulation Beast with more than 100,000 eons is not invaluable, and even the Supreme is happy to kill such an Abyss Tribulation Beast.

Sure enough, although one of the abyssal beast's claws stretched out towards the void passage, it still didn't rush over in the end.

For Ye Tian, this time he gained a lot, not only knowing the key to impacting the supreme one, but also obtaining the space eternal ancestral endowment.

In addition, he completed the task of Tianfeng Sea.

"It is impossible for Tianfeng Hai to really give a rule celestial object by one person, it is estimated that it is given to a broken rule celestial object, otherwise, if there are multiple invincibles who successfully send the box to the Yuanji Abyss this time, wouldn't Tianfeng Hai have to take out a large number of rule celestial objects?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, it's not that Tianfeng Hai can't take it out, but it won't be taken out easily.

The rule of celestial objects is not an ordinary treasure, Tianfeng Hai only set such a high remuneration in order to attract invincible people to take on this task, just deliberately attracting invincible people.

"We'll find out when we get back!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It will be safe on the way back, after all, the Heavenly Wind Supreme has broken through to become the supreme, and the Netherworld Temple naturally does not dare to attack and kill the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea again, it would be good not to be attacked and killed.

After millions of years, Ye Tian had traversed countless exotic worlds and finally arrived at the Tianlin Realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to Tianfeng Sea to submit the task.

However, this time it was not the Qingyang Supreme who was in charge of this matter, but a second-class invincible Qi Hai.

Qi Hai said: "Ye Tian, after confirmation, you did send the box to the Yuanji Abyss, this is a rule heavenly thing for you." "

Ye Tian took a ring given by Qi Hai, the ring was a void ring, and it contained a regular heavenly object inside.

Ye Tian's consciousness entered the inside of the Void Ring, and a branch floated in the void.

This branch is the rule!

At first glance, he thought that this branch was a complete regular celestial object, but Ye Tian found that the breath of this branch and a complete regular celestial object was too far away.

"This should be a big tree in the form of a regular celestial object that has been cut off by a branch, Tianfeng Hai can't be a lot of branches, and treat every branch as a regular celestial object as a reward, right?" Ye Tian was shocked.

If this is the case, the high-level of Tianfeng Sea is too picky and too tricky.

However, Tianfeng Hai has now become a Saint-level force, even if the surviving invincible knows that they have been trapped, they will not complain about anything, but will be very happy, after all, it is an extremely rare opportunity to become a member of the Saint-level force.

Qi Hai also seemed to feel that this reward was a bit tricky, so he said: "Tianfeng Hai has also decided to give 30 million contribution points to the invincible who completes the task!"

30 million contribution value is really a lot, although there is no shortage of contribution value, but the mood is at least a lot better.

......

Feathering the world.

At this time, Ye Tian's body was here, so the copy body also returned here.

Ye Tian copied the Space Eternal Ancestral Fu from the copy body, which was equivalent to permanently obtaining the Space Eternal Ancestral Gift.

Then, Ye Tian took out the branch of the regular celestial object and looked at it carefully.

"It's a very garbage rule celestial object, containing the eternal rules of wood, but it only contains a little bit, equivalent to the eternal rules of one ten-thousandth of a normal rule celestial object, if you want to rely on such a rule of heavenly fragments to comprehend the eternal rules of wood, it will take at least hundreds of thousands of times more time or even longer. "

Ye Tian shook his head and said.

In short, the value of such a rule celestial fragment is not low, at least it is worth hundreds of millions of contribution points, but compared with the real rule celestial object, there is no comparison.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian discovered an incredible scene, this branch was actually absorbing the breath of the Void Golden Mountain, and it was recovering little by little.

Of course, the recovery of the branches is very slow, and if you don't look closely, you won't be able to spot it.

And so.

Ye Tian inserted the branch into the Void Gold Mountain, and the Eternal Void Gold Mountain repaired the branches at a faster speed.

At this rate, perhaps after a few dark elongations, this branch will be completely repaired, and it may become a completely new regular celestial object.

"Can an eternal source object like the Void Mi Golden Mountain repair a regular celestial object?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

He found that he knew too little about the Eternal Source.

However, the Void Mi Gold Mountain ranks among the more than 100 Eternal Source Objects, which is not a low ranking.

In fact, there are many types of eternal source objects found in the source sea, there are tens of thousands, so more than a hundred is a high ranking, and even the eternal source of soul blue gold is only ranked more than a thousand, which is not as good as the Void Gold Mountain.

Perhaps it is precisely because of the special ability of the Void Gold Mountain that it can rank so high, and repairing the rule of heaven is an ability of the Void Gold Mountain, but the outside world has not publicized it.

Of course, repairing the Eternal Celestial Objects would consume the Void Gold Mountain's own abilities, and the value of the Eternal Source Objects was much higher than that of the Regular Celestial Objects, so the Ordinary Invincible would not do such a thing with the Eternal Source Objects.

"I don't urgently need the Void Gold Mountain now, and besides, if I only repair one regular celestial object, I shouldn't need much energy from the Void Gold Mountain, right?"

Ye Tian thought so.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian decided to use the Void Mi Golden Mountain to repair this fragment of the rule celestial object.

Time passes slowly –

While Ye Tian was paying attention to the Void Mi Golden Mountain repairing the regular heavenly object branches, he also comprehended the creation of the invincible ancestral technique and cultivated the invincible body of the Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Wanyuan Returning Ruins Invincible Body Raid Body was perfected to the third level of small success and great success......

And Ye Tian's invincible ancestral skills have gradually reached more than a dozen, but he still reaches the third-rank invincible realm every time.

Maybe the others have already stepped into the third-class invincible, but he has cultivated the Ten Thousand Sources to return to the ruins, and he has cultivated to the third level, resulting in the invincible body being not consummated, so he must cultivate to the third level of consummation, so that he can be regarded as the current realm of the invincible body consummation, so that he can step into the realm of the third-class invincible.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian's Wanyuan Returning Ruins reached the third consummation realm, and his whole person also underwent an incredible qualitative change.
